data.scene: When the frontend WebView requests a barcode/QR code scan.
data.purpose: Scan QR codes for IoT device provisioning, login authentication.
data.item: Camera live preview feed, decoded barcode content
data.recipient: Scan result returned to frontend WebView
data.thirdparty: No third-party involvement; uses local ZXing/MLKit libraries
data.switchpath: Permission dialog shown when frontend triggers a scan request

permissions.name: CAMERA
permissions.purpose: Activate the rear camera for scanning QR codes / barcodes
permissions.impact: If denied, barcode scanning will be unavailable
